activity_summary: A support operations manager reviews refund escalation cases and decides approve, policy review, or missing evidence.

verification_checklist: Run npm test
Run npm run capture:model-ui:screenshots
feature render paths must not emit raw input, select, textarea, or checkbox markup outside approved helpers
new primitives or variants require updating the repo-local contract first
generated UI must include a local check command or equivalent static inspection
gemma4-lms-judgmentkit-material-ui desktop screenshot has a styled primary work surface
gemma4-lms-judgmentkit-material-ui mobile screenshot keeps the decision and handoff visible
desktop viewport screenshot
mobile viewport screenshot
keyboard focus check for interactive controls
overflow check for long labels, descriptions, and values
modal or dialog footer order check when dialogs are present
disabled, empty, error, and ready state review
Verify state: selected work item is visible
Verify state: decision evidence is scannable
Verify state: primary action and handoff reason are clear
Verify required state: empty
Verify required state: ready
Verify required state: loading
Verify required state: error
Verify required state: disabled
Verify required state: focus-visible

command_display: lms chat google/gemma-4-e2b --system-prompt You generate one static product UI candidate for a JudgmentKit comparison fixture. Return one valid JSON object only. Do not use Markdown fences. Do not include scripts, external assets, remote fonts, or external image URLs. Respect the context boundary described in the user prompt. --prompt <prompt> --ttl 300 --yes
notes: Gemma 4 (local LLM) output captured through lms for the JudgmentKit 3x4 model UI matrix. Compatibility alias for the previous six-artifact matrix URL.

parsed.summary: Review workspace for refund request R-1842 where evidence is incomplete, requiring the customer to provide a receipt photo before approval.

surface.heading: Refund Review Workspace

selected.request: Subscription renewal disputed after agent escalation.
evidence: Renewal date confirmed in purchase history.
Support note captures the customer's refund reason.
Receipt photo is missing before manager approval.
selected.policy: Inside exception window. Manager approval is allowed when evidence is complete; unclear duplicate-charge cases go to policy review.

evidence: Renewal date confirmed in purchase history.
Support note captures the customer's refund reason.
Receipt photo is missing before manager approval.
surface.policy: Inside exception window. Manager approval is allowed when evidence is complete; unclear duplicate-charge cases go to policy review.

handoff.title: Handoff
handoff.reason: Receipt photo is missing. Ask the customer to attach proof before approval.
